title: Fix Reports Not Loading Due to Content Security Policy Errors
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing reports for FundCanna, I want reports to load without CSP errors, so that I can access and review report data.
description: Reports were not loading in the FundCanna environment. Browser console showed multiple Content Security Policy (CSP) errors blocking resources needed by the reports page.
acceptance_criteria: Reports load successfully without CSP errors in the browser console
CSP headers are configured to allow required report resources
middleware_changes: Updated Content Security Policy headers to allow required resources for the reports page.
implementation_notes: CSP policy was blocking resources needed by the reports rendering. Fix involved updating CSP directives to whitelist the necessary sources.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the CSP issue and requested review.
